title: BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: OPTIONS COUNSELING AND FAMILY SERVICES FLORENCE BEHAVIORAL HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Outpatient mental health services are provided in the office, schools and community. Options therapists work together with clients to achieve mutually agreed upon goals. With a comprehensive understanding of the family's history and culture, therapists work closely with clients, in collaboration with their key supports and influences, with the intention of forward movement on a path toward a positive future. Telehealth services are available. Psychiatric care provides comprehensive psychiatric assessments as well as on-going medication management as part of mental health treatment. Clients must be engaged in active therapy services to participate in medication management. 1445 8th Street Florence, OR 97439 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Email (541) 997-6261 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Intake (541) 997-6261 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call intake line. Telehealth services available. FEES: Accepts Oregon Health Plan, Medicare, most private insurance plans, and sliding fee scale is available DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas and Lane Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8:30am-5pm Services: Adolescent/Youth Counseling Child Abuse Counseling Child Guidance Mental Health Evaluation Psychiatric Medication Services Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - FAMILY SUPPORT AND CONNECTIONS INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - IN-HOME SAFETY AND REUNIFICATION SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING CLASSES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
